message:
test(brenner-loop): add hypothesis lifecycle and session machine tests

- hypothesis-lifecycle.test.ts: 85 tests covering factory functions,
  state transitions (LOCK_PREDICTION, START_TESTING, RECORD_SUPPORT,
  RECORD_FALSIFICATION, CREATE_SUCCESSOR, PAUSE, RESUME, REACTIVATE,
  ABANDON), guards, type guards, display helpers, and statistics.

- session-machine.test.ts: 78 tests covering 6 guard functions, phase
  transitions for all 11 phases, GO_TO_PHASE navigation, helper functions,
  and integration tests for full session flows.

All tests pass.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
